en: This requirement is triggered because you indicated your organization maintains a valid Slovakia Trade License Certificate in the Slovakia Trade & Professional Registration Requirements Applicability Assessment.

The Slovakia Trade License is the mandatory authorization for most companies and sole traders to legally operate business activities in Slovakia. The Trade License is an official certificate granted to legal entities or individuals, permitting them to engage in specified commercial activities under Slovak law.​ It establishes the company’s legal eligibility to do business and is a prerequisite for participation in tax, labor, and facility standards systems. Act No. 455 Collection of Laws on Trades (Trade Licensing Act) Ministry of the Interior Trade Licensing Information Slovak Government Portal Business Registration Guide
